Project][https://www.itsrugby.co.uk/players/ugo-tison-39834.html itsrugby] | updated = 31 August 2025 }} '''Ugo Tison''' (born 7 July 2001) is a French professional [[rugby league]] footballer who plays as a {{rlp|so}} or {{rlp|hk}} for the [[Catalans Dragons]] in the [[Super League]]. ==Playing career== ===Catalans Dragons=== In 2022, he made his [[Catalans Dragons|Catalans]] debut in the [[Super League]] against the [[Wigan Warriors]].{{cite web|url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/62774591|title=Super League: Wigan Warriors 48-4 Catalans Dragons - Warriors claim eight tries to finish second|publisher=BBC|date=2 September 2022|accessdate=3 September 2022}} ===Wynnum Manly Seagulls=== On 15 January 2025 it was reported that he had signed for [[Wynnum Manly Seagulls]] in the [[Queensland Cup]] for 2025.{{cite web|website=Total RL|author=Callum Walker|date=15 Jan 2025|title=Ex-Catalans Dragons hooker Ugo Tison finds new club following London Broncos spell|url=https://www.totalrl.com/ex-catalans-dragons-hooker-ugo-tison-finds-new-club-following-london-broncos-spell/}} ===Catalans Dragons (re-join)=== On 3 August 2025 it was reported that he had re-joined [[Catalans Dragons]] in the [[Super League]].{{cite web|website=Serious About Rugby League|date=3 Aug 2025|accessdate=31 Aug 2025|author=Sam Cook|title=Catalans Dragons’ rebuild continues as club confirm hooker’s return following spell Down Under|url=https://www.seriousaboutrl.com/rugby-league-news-catalans-dragons-confirm-hookers-return-following-spell-down-under-107004/}} == International == He made his début on 29 April 2023 in the 64-0 defeat to {{rlnt|England}} at the [[Halliwell Jones Stadium]].{{cn|date=March 2024}} ==References== {{reflist|30em}} ==External links==
